name: Italian Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole tomatoes, cut up (28 oz)
1 cup Uncooked macaroni OR other pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a slow cooker or skillet on medium heat.
2. Transfer the browned meat to the slow cooker (or cooking pot).
3. Add the remaining ingredients except the pasta to the cooking pot.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours, or on high for 3-4 hours.
6. Increase heat to high if using a different slow cooker setting.
7. Add the pasta and stir until combined.
8. Cover and continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes until the pasta is done.
